title: BEM-1210 contour integrity
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_contour_registry_integrity.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

CONTOURS = Path("governance/contours/contours_registry.json")
PASSPORTS = Path("governance/objects/object_passports.json")
EXPECTED_ALGORITHM = ["analyst_proposal", "auditor_precheck", "worker_execution", "auditor_postcheck"]


def validate():
    contours = json.loads(CONTOURS.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("contours", [])
    objects = {item.get("id") for item in json.loads(PASSPORTS.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("objects", [])}
    errors = []
    expected_ids = {"C1", "C2", "C3"}
    ids = {item.get("id") for item in contours}
    missing = sorted(expected_ids - ids)
    if missing:
        errors.append(f"missing contours: {missing}")
    for item in contours:
        cid = item.get("id", "UNKNOWN")
        if item.get("director") not in objects:
            errors.append(f"{cid}: director object missing")
        if item.get("curator") not in objects:
            errors.append(f"{cid}: curator object missing")
        if item.get("algorithm") != EXPECTED_ALGORITHM:
            errors.append(f"{cid}: invalid algorithm")
        roles = set(item.get("roles", []))
        if roles != {"analyst", "auditor", "worker"}:
            errors.append(f"{cid}: roles must be analyst/auditor/worker")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    errs = validate()
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS contour_registry_integrity")
